headline: Gap's Full-Price Selling Improves: Can AUR Gains Continue Ahead?
summary: GAP strengthens full-price selling and AUR gains, boosting merchandise margins as tighter inventory and stronger demand reshape its pricing power outlook.

headline: The TJX Companies Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy
summary: TJX has announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend, reinforcing financial strength and commitment to shareholder value.
